meanings.definition: the basic unit of money in Uganda; equal to 100 cents
the basic unit of money in Tanzania; equal to 100 cents
the basic unit of money in Somalia; equal to 100 cents
the basic unit of money in Kenya; equal to 100 cents
a former monetary unit in Great Britain
an English coin worth one twentieth of a pound

examples: The shill bid for the expensive carpet during the auction in order to drive the price up
